replies.author: @GlobeDiscovery-NY
replies.text: Thank you for sharing your view. The economic challenges and resource scarcity in the region are highly complex, driven by a combination of internal conflicts, severe climate impacts, and geopolitical factors like sanctions or embargoes. Our goal is to present these multi-layered realities based on the reports and local perspectives available. We appreciate you adding your voice to the discussion!

replies.author: @GlobeDiscovery-NY
replies.text: Thank you for sharing your perspective. We understand that Cuba is currently going through an incredibly difficult economic crisis and systemic challenges. Travel documentaries often capture specific moments, cultural heritage, and the resilience of the local people, which may stand in contrast to the harsh daily realities on the ground right now. We appreciate your raw and honest feedback

replies.author: @GlobeDiscovery-NY
replies.text: Thank you for sharing your thoughts! Cuba's development of CIMAvax is definitely an incredible scientific achievement. It’s worth noting that it works as a therapeutic vaccine to prolong life and manage the cancer rather than a complete cure, and international collaborations (including trials in the US) are actually ongoing to study it further. It’s a complex topic with many angles!
